name: Creating Accessible Scientific Figures
description: Scientific journals require microscopy figures to be accessible to color-blind readers (avoiding Red/Green combinations) and to include visible scale bars. Transform the 'Fluorescent Cells' sample image into a publication-quality figure by changing the Red channel to Magenta while keeping the Green channel Green. Set the spatial calibration to 0.16 µm/pixel and include a 10 µm white scale bar in the lower right corner. Save the final flattened RGB image as a PNG to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/accessible_figure.png.
